title: English Booster: Grammar & Vocabulary
description: Practice parts of speech, past tenses, sentence structure, and word meanings.

questions.text:
Welcome to the English Booster Challenge! 🚀

This mixed-modality worksheet is designed to test your knowledge of English grammar, vocabulary, and writing. Read each question carefully and give it your best shot!

questions.question:
Which word in the following sentence is an ADVERB?

'The sleek spacecraft glided gracefully through the cosmic void.'
questions.hint: Adverbs often end in '-ly' and describe how an action is performed.

questions.question: Complete the story with the correct verb form (Past Simple or Past Continuous):
questions.text: Yesterday afternoon, while Marcus [was typing|typed|types] (type) on his holographic terminal, a strange signal [appeared] (appear) on the main monitor. He immediately [called] (call) his supervisor, but she [was having|had|has] (have) a meeting with the space commander.

questions.question: Match the space-themed words with their correct definitions:

pairs.rightText: A giant cloud of dust and gas in space
The curved path of a celestial object around a star or planet
A huge system of billions of stars, gas, and dust held together by gravity
A group of stars forming a recognizable pattern

questions.question: Choose the correct prepositions to complete the sentences:

statements.text: The captain sits [on] the command bridge.
We will jump to hyperspace [at] exactly midnight.
The space station orbits the star [in] 365 days.

questions.question: Rearrange the words to form a correct grammatical sentence:
Describe a fictional mission to Mars. Make sure to use the words 'exploration', 'oxygen', and 'scientific' in your answer.
